title: FancySK
description: A Skript addon that allows you to interact with FancyHolograms & FancyNpcs.
body:
## Hey guys! This is a Skript addon that introduces syntaxes for FancyNpcs/Holograms.

Not much to say here, it's pretty self explanatory.
Go check out the syntaxes on the latest [Github](https://github.com/lostsucks/FancySK) releases!
